title: Comedy For The Curious
description: * Shaftesbury Fringe 2023 Award Winner, Best Comedy * Ever wonder why we are the way we are? Award-winning comedian Robyn Perkins returns to Brighton to explore a brand new topic in her critically acclaimed, science comedy panel show. This year at The Brighton Fringe we are exploring MOTIVATION on May 18th. Robyn teams up with scientists and comedians to answer questions you never knew you had! Think Mock the Week meets QI, live at the Fringe... ★★★★ "A perfect sweet spot between insight and entertainment" One4Review. ★★★★½ "Enlightening and uproarious" FringeFeed These two shows are part of the Comedy for the Curious series including Battle of the Reefs and Shrink Wrapped: A Psychologist Analyses Comedians, Live on Stage. Check the Robyn Perkins's website for more information.
